nasb.text: But the people were silent and answered him not a word, for the king’s commandment was, “Do not answer him.”

esv.text: But the people were silent and answered him not a word, for the king’s command was, “Do not answer him.”

cnv.text: 眾民都不出聲，一句話也不回答他，因為王吩咐他們：“不要回答他。”

ccb.text: 民众默不作声，因为希西迦曾吩咐他们不要答话。
